en: Every parent shares the same hope —

zh: 家長總希望自己的孩子在學習的起跑線上能一馬當先、
en: wanting their child to lead from the starting line of learning.

zh: 然而每個孩子的個性與個別差異有很大的不同、
en: But every child's personality and individual differences vary greatly.
When you ask your child to focus,

zh: 別忘了先為孩子提供一個良好的學習環境。
en: don't forget to first provide them with a good learning environment.
